articles.title: Hungary Yields Approach UK Gilts as Pro-EU Turn Fuels Rally
articles.summary: Hungary’s bonds have rallied so much that yields are approaching those in the UK, the latest sign that investors are backing the new government’s plans to fix the economy and join the euro region.

articles.title: Bain Capital Nears Deal for Stake in Volkswagen’s Everllence Unit
articles.summary: Bain Capital emerged victorious in one of Europe’s most hotly contested private equity auctions with an agreement to buy a controlling stake in Volkswagen AG’s heavy diesel-engine unit.

articles.title: H&M’s Sales Miss Estimates as Turnaround Questions Persist
articles.summary: H&M AB reported disappointing sales, posing a fresh challenge to the Swedish fast-fashion retailer’s turnaround efforts amid intense competition and cautious consumer spending.

articles.title: UK Modifies Proposed Steel Import Curb After Industry Complaints
